creator: sahil@tandon.net
text:
On Thu, 2012-04-12 at 14:27:37 +0900, Svyatoslav Lempert wrote:

> Add !defined(BATCH) to Makefile is better, please view this and approve
> 
> -.if !empty(OLD_MAILER)
> +.if !defined(BATCH) && !empty(OLD_MAILER)
>  IS_INTERACTIVE=        yes

I prefer to check whether BATCH is undefined in the previous .if
statement.  I'll make the revision during the next version update.

-- 
Sahil Tandon
